Common.name: Name
Common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Common.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

Auth.welcome: Welcome to the WeBuyCars MZ console
Auth.invalidCredentials: That email and password don’t match our records. Please try again.
Auth.loginTagline: Secure hub for marketplace administration and dealer partners in Mozambique.
Auth.loginSecureHint: Your sign-in is protected with industry-standard security.
Auth.accountNotProvisioned: This email signed in, but your profile is not set up in our system yet. Please contact support so they can finish your account setup.
Auth.noPortalAccess: This account is not enabled for the admin or dealer area. Ask your organisation’s administrator to grant you access.
Auth.missingFields: Please enter both email and password.
Auth.inviteCompletionHint: Invited users should open their email link first—you will land on “Finish your access” to set a password, then go to your workspace. The sign-in form below is only for people who already have a password.
Auth.inviteLinkExpiredDetail: The invitation or email link has expired or was already used. Ask your administrator or dealer manager to send a new invitation. If you never finished setting up the account, they may need to cancel the old invite before using the same email again.
Auth.inviteLinkErrorGeneric: Sign-in could not be completed from this link. Try again or request a new invitation.
Auth.completeInviteLoadingBody: Please wait while we confirm your invitation.
Auth.completeInviteDescription: Your invitation is valid. Set a password you will use to sign in to the console from now on.
Auth.completeInvitePasswordHint: Use at least 8 characters. Avoid reusing a password from another site.
Auth.completeInviteSuccess: Password saved. Taking you to your workspace…
Auth.completeInvitePasswordMismatch: The two passwords do not match.
Auth.completeInviteNoLinkTitle: This page needs an invitation link
Auth.completeInviteNoLinkBody: Open the full link from your email (or paste the secure link you were given). If you already have a password, use the normal sign-in page instead.
Auth.completeInviteStuckTitle: We could not finish signing you in
Auth.completeInviteStuckBody: The link may be expired, already used, or blocked by the browser. Request a new access link from your administrator, then try again in a fresh window or private browsing mode.
Auth.noPortalAccessTitle: This account has no portal access yet
Auth.noPortalAccessBody: You are signed in, but this account is not enabled for any active dealer or admin workspace. We checked your dealer link again and access is still not available.
Auth.noPortalAccessHint: Ask your administrator to add you under Portal team (dealer) or to invite you as admin. If you opened the wrong account, sign out and use the invite link again.

ConfigRef.deleteDescription: This cannot be undone. If this item is still linked to listings or other data, you will need to turn it off instead of deleting it.
ConfigRef.dialogHint: Use a short, unique code (lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens work well). You can turn an item off instead of deleting it.
ConfigRef.pickBrand: Select a brand for this model.
ConfigRef.noBrands: Create at least one brand before adding models.
ConfigRef.unauthorized: You don’t have permission to change these settings. Sign in with an admin account or ask a colleague.
ConfigRef.inUse: This item is still linked to other data, so it can’t be deleted. Turn it off instead, or remove the links first.
ConfigRef.duplicateSlug: That short code is already in use. Please choose another.
ConfigRef.unknownError: We couldn’t save your changes. Check your connection and try again.

UsersAdmin.intro: Directory of people who can sign in to this console or the apps. Use filters for administrators, dealer team members, or private marketplace users.
UsersAdmin.inviteAdminHint: They will get an invitation to choose a password and open this admin console. You can also copy a secure link after you send—useful if the message is delayed or goes to spam.
UsersAdmin.inviteSuccessEmailOnly: Invitation created. An email was requested for them—ask them to check spam as well. If nothing arrives, send the invite again or ask your hosting provider to verify outgoing email.
UsersAdmin.inviteSuccessHybrid: Invitation created. An email was requested, and you can copy a secure link below—share it only with them if their inbox is empty.
UsersAdmin.inviteSuccessManual: Copy the secure link below and send it only to this person (for example through your company chat).
UsersAdmin.inviteStaffHint: Adds a staff seat for this dealer. The address must not already be registered on the platform.
UsersAdmin.inviteStaffSuccessEmailOnly: Invitation created for your teammate. Ask them to check spam if the message is slow. You can send the invite again if needed.
UsersAdmin.inviteStaffSuccessHybrid: Teammate invitation created. An email was requested, and you can copy a secure link below if they do not receive it.
UsersAdmin.inviteStaffSuccessManual: Copy the secure link below and send it only to your teammate.
UsersAdmin.inviteLinkDialogBody: Anyone with this link can finish signing up as invited. Share it only through a channel you trust, and treat it like a password.
UsersAdmin.inviteEmailExists: That email is already registered. Use another address or ask support to attach an existing user.
UsersAdmin.inviteFailed: We could not create that invitation. Please try again in a moment. If it keeps failing, contact support.
UsersAdmin.inviteDealerInactive: This dealer is suspended. Activate the dealer before inviting teammates.

PackagesAdmin.intro: Manage subscription catalogues for dealers and (where applicable) private sellers. Prefer deactivating a plan instead of deleting it if dealers still reference it.
PackagesAdmin.workflowNote: Each plan defines how many listings are included in the period and the fee for extra listings. When a listing is published, billing can use the plan allowance or a separate pay-per-listing charge, depending on the options shown to the dealer. The Audience column controls whether a plan is offered only to dealers, only to private sellers, or to both.
PackagesAdmin.deleteDescription: You can’t delete a plan while dealers are still on it. Turn the plan off instead—it will stay hidden from new sign-ups.
PackagesAdmin.editorHint: All amounts are in MZN. Each plan needs its own short code.
PackagesAdmin.unauthorized: You do not have permission to change packages.
PackagesAdmin.inUse: This package is still linked to subscriptions. Deactivate it instead of deleting.
PackagesAdmin.duplicateSlug: That short code is already used by another package.
PackagesAdmin.unknownError: We couldn’t save this package. Check the numbers you entered and try again.
PackagesAdmin.nameSlug: Please enter a name for the package.
PackagesAdmin.scopeHelp: Dealer: dealer subscription catalog only. Private seller: private-seller catalog only. Both: offered in both catalogs.
PackagesAdmin.field_listing_limit: Listing allowance must be a whole number of at least 1.
PackagesAdmin.field_duration_days: Duration must be a whole number of days (at least 1).
PackagesAdmin.field_featured_listing_allowance: Featured slots must be zero or a positive whole number.
PackagesAdmin.field_sponsored_listing_allowance: Sponsored slots must be zero or a positive whole number.
PackagesAdmin.field_price: Package price must be zero or more (numbers only).
PackagesAdmin.field_price_per_extra_listing: Per-listing fee must be zero or more (numbers only).

ListingBilling.sectionTitle: How should this listing be billed?
ListingBilling.sectionHint: Choose whether this draft should use your current plan’s included listings, or be paid for separately when you publish.
ListingBilling.optionSubscriptionBody: Counts against your current plan when the vehicle is published. Best when you still have free slots.
ListingBilling.optionPayPerBody: You’ll pay a one-off fee when you publish. We use your plan’s usual per-ad amount, or the smallest current dealer rate if you aren’t on a plan yet.
ListingBilling.noSubscriptionBody: You can still create the draft and publish later using pay-per-listing, or complete subscription onboarding first.
ListingBilling.pendingPaymentBody: Your plan ({package}) is not active until the subscription payment is completed. Open Subscription to finish payment, then return here.
ListingBilling.pendingPaymentToast: Complete the subscription payment first, then you can bill this listing against your plan.
ListingBilling.subscriptionInactiveBody: Latest subscription status is “{status}” for {package}. Use pay-per-listing for this draft or resolve billing with support.
ListingBilling.referenceFee: Typical one-off listing fee from our current plans: about {amount} MZN.
ListingBilling.privateCatalogNote: {count} active plan(s) are also offered to private sellers in the mobile app.
ListingBilling.subscriptionFull: Your subscription has no remaining listing slots for this path. Choose pay per listing or upgrade your plan.
ListingBilling.persistFailed: We couldn’t create your draft right now. Please try again in a moment. If it keeps happening, contact support.
ListingBilling.titleRequired: Please enter a title for this listing.

AdminDealerCreate.unauthorized: Please sign in again to continue.
AdminDealerCreate.forbidden: You don’t have permission to create dealers. Ask an administrator.
AdminDealerCreate.service_role_missing: This environment isn’t fully ready yet. Please contact whoever manages your website or hosting.
AdminDealerCreate.invalid_body: Some information looks incomplete or invalid. Please review the form.
AdminDealerCreate.auth_user_create_failed: We couldn’t create the manager account—this email may already be in use. Try another email or contact support.
AdminDealerCreate.manager_email_exists: That email is already linked to an account. Use a different address for the first manager, or ask support to attach an existing user.
AdminDealerCreate.dealer_insert_failed: We couldn’t save the dealer. Please try again or contact support.
AdminDealerCreate.subscription_insert_failed: We couldn’t start the subscription. Please try again or contact support.
AdminDealerCreate.staff_insert_failed: We couldn’t finish team setup. Please try again or contact support.
AdminDealerCreate.package_lookup_failed: We couldn’t read the subscription package price. Please try again or contact support.
AdminDealerCreate.payment_insert_failed: The dealer was almost created, but the initial pending payment could not be saved. Please try again or contact support.
AdminDealerCreate.server_error: Something went wrong on our side. Please try again in a few minutes.
AdminDealerCreate.generic: We couldn’t create the dealer. Please try again or contact support.

Admin.managerEmailHelp: They will get an invite to choose a password and open the dealer portal. After you create the dealer, you can copy a secure link if email is slow or missing.
Admin.dealerLogoHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF up to 2 MB. Stored in your media library.
Admin.dealerLogoTooLarge: The logo file is too large. Please choose an image under 2 MB.
Admin.dealerLogoInvalidType: Please choose a JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF image.
Admin.dealerLogoUploadFailed: We couldn’t upload the logo. Check your connection and try again.
Admin.dealerCreatedInviteEmailed: The dealer was created. The manager should receive an email with next steps—ask them to check spam if it does not arrive.
Admin.dealerCreatedWithManualInvite: The dealer was created. Copy the sign-up link for the manager below and send it through a channel you trust.
Admin.dealerInviteLinkDialogBody: Share this link with the first manager so they can set a password and access the portal. Share it privately and only with them.
Admin.dealerTeamIntro: Everyone with portal access for this dealer is listed here. If the manager’s invite expired or they did not get email, use “Send manager access again”. If they already have an account with the same email but are not listed, use “Link existing manager” below—new invites cannot reuse an email that is already registered.
Admin.dealerTeamLinkManagerHint: Use this when the person already signed up with that email (for example as a buyer or on another flow). We attach them to this dealer as portal manager and send a fresh access path—no duplicate account.
Admin.dealerTeamLinkManagerSuccessEmail: Manager linked. A new invitation was sent by email when delivery is working.
Admin.dealerTeamLinkManagerSuccessManual: Manager linked. Copy the new access link from the dialog and share it only with them.
Admin.dealerTeamEmptyHint: No portal members are linked yet. Enter the manager’s registered email above, then “Link and send access”.
Admin.dealerTeamLinkErrDealerNotFound: This dealer could not be found.
Admin.dealerTeamLinkErrDealerInactive: This dealer is suspended. Activate the dealer in admin before linking a manager.
Admin.dealerTeamLinkErrStaffVerify: We could not confirm the manager was linked. Try again or contact support.
Admin.dealerTeamLinkErrUserNotFound: No account exists with that email yet. The person must register once first, or the spelling may differ from their profile.
Admin.dealerTeamLinkErrAmbiguousEmail: More than one profile matched that email. Contact support to resolve the duplicate.
Admin.dealerTeamLinkErrCannotAdmin: System administrator accounts cannot be linked as a dealer manager.
Admin.dealerTeamLinkErrUserLookup: We could not look up that email. Try again or contact support.
Admin.dealerTeamLinkErrStaffWrite: The manager was found but we could not save the team link. Try again or contact support.
Admin.dealerAdminEditHint: Changes apply immediately for the dealer portal and public listings.
Admin.dealerAdminActivated: Dealer portal access is enabled again.
Admin.dealerAdminBlocked: This dealer can no longer open the dealer portal.
Admin.dealerAdminAccessHint: Suspended dealers cannot open the dealer portal. Their listings stay on file until you handle them separately.
Admin.dealerAdminStatusActive: This dealer can sign in and use the portal.
Admin.dealerAdminStatusBlocked: This dealer is blocked from the portal.
Admin.dealerAdminSubscriptionPendingHint: While payment is still pending, you can change the assigned package. The amount the dealer sees for checkout updates to match.
Admin.dealerAdminSubscriptionLockedHint: The package can only be changed while the subscription is awaiting first payment. After activation, use billing or support workflows.
Admin.dealerAdminSubPackageUpdated: Package and pending payment amount were updated.
Admin.dealerAdminDangerHint: Deleting a dealer cannot be undone. There must be no vehicle listings linked to this dealer.
Admin.dealerAdminDeleteBody: Type the dealer identifier below exactly as shown to confirm permanent deletion.
Admin.dealerAdminErrForbidden: You don’t have permission for this action.
Admin.dealerAdminErrService: This action could not be completed on the server. Please contact the person who looks after your site or hosting.
Admin.dealerAdminErrInvalid: Some fields are invalid. Check the form.
Admin.dealerAdminErrUpdate: We couldn’t save changes. Try again or contact support.
Admin.dealerAdminErrConfirmMismatch: The confirmation ID did not match. Nothing was deleted.
Admin.dealerAdminErrHasListings: This dealer still has vehicle listings. Remove or reassign them before deleting.
Admin.dealerAdminErrHasListingsDetail: Cannot delete: {count} listing(s) still reference this dealer.
Admin.dealerAdminErrDelete: Deletion failed. Try again or contact support.
Admin.dealerAdminErrSubNotPending: The subscription is no longer awaiting payment; the package cannot be changed from here.
Admin.dealerAdminErrSubNotFound: No subscription record was found for this dealer.
Admin.dealerAdminErrPackage: That package could not be found.
Admin.dealerAdminErrSubUpdate: We couldn’t update the subscription. Try again.
Admin.dealerAdminErrManager: No active manager was found for this dealer to attach billing to.
Admin.dealerAdminManagerAccessHint: If their invitation expired or they did not receive email, send a fresh access link from here.
Admin.dealerAdminResendManagerEmail: A new invitation email was sent when delivery is working.
Admin.dealerAdminResendManagerManual: A new access link is ready. Copy it and send it only to the manager.
Admin.dealerAdminResendLinkDialogBody: They use this link to set a password or sign in, then return to this console. Share it privately.
Admin.dealerAdminErrResendManagerNotFound: No active manager is linked to this dealer.
Admin.dealerAdminErrResendManagerEmailMissing: The manager account has no email on file. Contact support to fix the user record.
Admin.dealerAdminErrResendLinkFailed: We could not prepare a new access link. Please wait a moment and try again, or contact support.
Admin.dealerAdminErrGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Admin.paymentsFilterIntro: Filter by payment status and type. Pending subscription payments appear when a new dealer is set up or checkout is in progress.

Dealer.managerOnlyPayments: Only the manager can make payments and change the subscription.
Dealer.stepFailed: We couldn’t complete that step. Please try again.
Dealer.onboardingPaymentReady: Your payment step is ready. Continue when you want to complete it.
Dealer.onboardingComplete: You’re all set. Taking you to your dashboard.

Payment.checkoutDescription: You will complete payment on PaySuite (M-Pesa, E-Mola, or card).
Payment.paysuiteNotConfigured: Payments are not configured. Add PaySuite credentials to the server environment.
Payment.returnStillPending: We could not confirm payment yet. If you already paid, it may take a minute. You can return to subscription or refresh later.
Payment.returnError: Could not reach the payment service. Try again in a moment.
Payment.returnInvalidHint: Open the payment link from your subscription page again.
Payment.pendingBody: Your subscription to {package} is awaiting payment of {price} {currency}. Choose a method to complete it.
Payment.errorNotFound: Payment record not found or already processed. Refresh the page and try again.
